# PERF-010 positive: template.New(...).Parse inside Gin handler
lang: go
file: PERF-010-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"html/template"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func RenderReport(c *gin.Context) {
	tmpl, err := template.New("report").Parse(`<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>`)
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	c.Header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8")
	_ = tmpl.Execute(c.Writer, gin.H{"Title": "Hello"})
}
